title: Marketplace Manager - Shiprocket Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Shiprocket Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shiprocket Capital India family as a Marketplace Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shiprocket Capital India:
Shiprocket Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket Capital India!
